methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: BLACK ERC20 (base emission token) held/moved by MinterUpgradeable, GaugeManager, gauges, bribes
LP/pool trading fees (token0/token1) accumulated in pools and Algebra Community Vaults; withdrawn and forwarded to gauges/bribes
Bribe reward tokens (token0/token1 plus any connector tokens) held by Bribe contracts and distributed to veNFT owners
Algebra CL farming rewards held/managed via AlgebraEternalFarming + FarmingCenter + VirtualPool; funded by GaugeCL

Approvals/allowances: GaugeManager approves base token to each gauge (max uint); GaugeCL approves rewardToken to AlgebraEternalFarming; Bribe contracts pull reward tokens from notifyRewardAmount callers
state_assets: GaugeManager: pools[] list; gauges[pool]->gauge; poolForGauge[gauge]->pool; isGauge/isCLGauge/isAlive; internal_bribes/external_bribes; claimable[gauge]; supplyIndex[gauge]; global index; gaugesDistributionTimestmap[gauge]
GaugeManager configuration: minter, base, _ve, bribefactory, permissionRegistry, voter, genesisManager, tokenHandler, blackGovernor, farmingParam, avm
GaugeFactoryCL: __gauges[] registry; last_gauge; dibs + dibsPercentage; permissionsRegistry; algebraPoolAPIStorage
GaugeCL: emergency flag; bribe addresses; DURATION/_periodFinish/rewardRate; poolAddress/algebraPool/communityVault; farmingParam pointers
Bribe: tokenRewardsPerEpoch[token][epoch]; lastEarn[token][tokenId]; checkpoints[tokenId][idx]; supplyCheckpoints; totalSupply + balanceOf[tokenId]; bribeTokens[] + isBribeToken
MinterUpgradeable: weekly emissions schedule vars; active_period; epochCount; team/teamRate; proposals[period]; gaugeManager/ve/rewards_distributor refs; initializer gate
AlgebraPoolAPI/veNFTAPIV1/RewardAPI/TokenAPI/AlgebraPoolAPIStorage: owner/config pointers, deployer mappings and read-API state
privilege_assets: OwnableUpgradeable owners: GaugeManager (owner can setAVM, plus inherited transferOwnership); GaugeFactoryCL; BribeFactoryV3; MinterUpgradeable; EpochController; AlgebraPoolAPIStorage (also CL_POOL_ADMIN via PermissionsRegistry)
GaugeCL Ownable owner: deployed gauge owner is passed as _distribution (GaugeManager) per GaugeFactoryCL; owner can toggle emergency + setInternalBribe
PermissionsRegistry roles (string-based): GAUGE_ADMIN, GOVERNANCE, EPOCH_MANAGER, BRIBE_ADMIN, CL_POOL_ADMIN; plus emergencyCouncil() and blackTeamMultisig() special authorities
Gauge lifecycle control: killGauge/reviveGauge (Governance role) affecting emissions routing
Factory lists in GaugeManager (_factoriesData) can be added/replaced/removed by GAUGE_ADMIN (impacts what pools/gauges can be created)

Emission control: MinterUpgradeable team can setTeamRate, setGaugeManager, setRewardDistributor; BlackGovernor team can setProposalNumerator and setTeam; GaugeManager GAUGE_ADMIN can setMinter and setBlackGovernor
reputation_assets: veNFT voting power / delegation trust: bribe distribution correctness and checkpoint integrity impacts voter incentives
Gauge weights and emissions routing (via IVoter.totalWeight/weights) affects perceived fairness of emissions
Protocol governance integrity (BlackGovernor proposals constrained to IMinter.nudge)
Automation/epoch flip correctness (EpochController performUpkeep/performPreUpkeep) affects emissions timing and fee distribution
Emergency mode signaling in GaugeCL (emergency on/off) impacts user confidence and reward availability

contracts_analyzed: Interfaces: IGaugeManager.sol, IGaugeCL.sol, IGaugeFactoryCL.sol, IVotingEscrow.sol, IVoter.sol, IBribe.sol, IBribeFactory.sol, IMinter.sol, IBlack.sol, IBlackGovernor.sol, IBlackHoleVotes.sol, IRewardsDistributor.sol, IAlgebraEternalFarmingCustom.sol, IAlgebraCustomCommunityVault.sol, ITokenHandler.sol, IPermissionsRegistry.sol, IERC20.sol, IPairFactory.sol, IPairInfo.sol, IAutoVotingEscrowManager.sol, IAutoVotingEscrow.sol
system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: GaugeManager(OwnableUpgradeable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable); GaugeFactoryCL(OwnableUpgradeable); BribeFactoryV3(OwnableUpgradeable); MinterUpgradeable(OwnableUpgradeable); EpochController(OwnableUpgradeable, AutomationCompatibleInterface); AlgebraPoolAPIStorage(Initializable, OwnableUpgradeable); AlgebraPoolAPI(Initializable); veNFTAPIV1(Initializable); RewardAPI(Initializable); TokenAPI(Initializable); GaugeCL(ReentrancyGuard, Ownable); Bribe(ReentrancyGuard); BlackGovernor(L2Governor + counting/votes/quorum extensions); Black(standalone ERC20-like).
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin upgradeable: OwnableUpgradeable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable, SafeERC20Upgradeable, Initializable
OpenZeppelin non-upgradeable: Ownable, ReentrancyGuard, SafeERC20, IERC20, Math (OZ utils)

CryptoAlgebra Integral: IAlgebraPool, IAlgebraCommunityVault/IAlgebraCustomCommunityVault, INonfungiblePositionManager, IFarmingCenter, IAlgebraEternalFarming, IAlgebraEternalVirtualPool, IncentiveKey, IncentiveId, IAlgebraPoolAPIStorage
Project interfaces: IVoter, IVotingEscrow, IRewardsDistributor, IPermissionsRegistry, ITokenHandler, Gauge/Bribe factories and gauges
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: Several contracts are upgradeable via OpenZeppelin Initializable + OwnableUpgradeable (GaugeManager, GaugeFactoryCL, BribeFactoryV3, MinterUpgradeable, EpochController, AlgebraPoolAPIStorage, plus read-only API contracts). No explicit proxy contract code provided here (assumed deployed behind Transparent/UUPS proxies externally). GaugeCL, Bribe, Black, BlackGovernor are non-upgradeable (direct deployment). No Diamond pattern detected.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Hybrid access control: (1) Ownable/OwnableUpgradeable for owner-only ops; (2) external IPermissionsRegistry.hasRole(roleString, caller) gating for GAUGE_ADMIN/GOVERNANCE/EPOCH_MANAGER/BRIBE_ADMIN/CL_POOL_ADMIN; (3) special authorities from registry: emergencyCouncil() and blackTeamMultisig(). Critical note: IPermissionsRegistry.hasRole takes bytes memory, but callers pass string literals, relying on implicit string->bytes conversion; role identifiers are not hashed on-chain here, so registry must match raw bytes of the string.

external_calls: same as _createGauge (CL passes bonusRewardToken to factory)
loops pools[] -> IGauge.claimFees() OR CL: IAlgebraCommunityVault.withdraw(token0/token1,balance) + IGaugeCL.claimFees()
subset loop; same external calls as distributeFees

state_changes: rewardRate (note: storage var exists but function uses local rewardRate; potential inconsistency)

external_calls: IBribe(bribe).addReward(_token[i][k]) nested loops (note: loop indexes likely incorrect; uses _token.length but indexes _token[i][k])
BUG: calls emergencyRecoverERC20 instead of recoverERC20AndUpdateData on bribes
validates only minter target and IMinter.nudge selector
multiple external view calls per pool + ERC20 symbol/decimals calls
multiple view calls to voter/ve/rewardDistributor per id
gaugeManager.external_bribes/internal_bribes (but reward calculation is commented out; returns empty structs)

upgradeability_surface.notes: Upgradeability not shown (no proxy contract in scope) but uses Initializable base patterns. If deployed behind proxy, storage layout must be preserved. Inherits OwnableUpgradeable; transferOwnership/renounceOwnership are externally accessible via OZ.
Uses OwnableUpgradeable. External createGauge is permissionless; ensure factory holds/has approval for reward token used in createEternalFarming (it calls safeApprove).
Uses OwnableUpgradeable. Several admin batch methods. Bug: recoverERC20AndUpdateData calls emergencyRecoverERC20 instead; addRewardsToBribes nested loop uses inconsistent indices.

Uses OwnableUpgradeable but critical auth is 'team' not owner(). Team can redirect gaugeManager/reward distributor and teamRate. update_period is public and can be called by anyone; mints and pushes rewards.
OwnableUpgradeable. performUpkeep/performPreUpkeep callable by automation registries or EPOCH_MANAGER role; can force distributeAll/distributeFees if IMinter.check passes.
OwnableUpgradeable + external role gate CL_POOL_ADMIN. Stores pairToDeployer mapping consumed by GaugeFactoryCL.createEternalFarming.
Read-only API with owner-like admin setters (not OZ Ownable).
Read-only API with owner-like admin setters (not OZ Ownable).
Read-only API with owner-like admin setters (not OZ Ownable).

Non-upgradeable. Ownable owner is set at construction to _distribution (GaugeManager) because GaugeFactoryCL passes distribution as owner param to OZ Ownable constructor. Owner can toggle emergency and change internal bribe.
Non-upgradeable. Critical entry points: notifyRewardAmount is public and pulls tokens; getReward restricted to gaugeManager; onlyAllowed is (owner or bribeFactory).
Non-upgradeable ERC20-like with privileged setMinter and initialMint callable by minter.
Non-upgradeable governance. propose restricted to calling IMinter.nudge on minter target only.
